response.step_by_step_log: 1. Performed a broad watch and observed the stage performance by Hakos Baelz. 2. Identified the song title 'SNAKE EYES' from on-screen title cards at 03:42. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'SNAKE EYES' by Hakos Baelz and WON AGAIN. 4. Broken the video into three scenes based on musical and conversational segments (Performance, Interlude, Performance). 5. Populated the JSON fields accordingly, using provided lyrics in both fields as it is a multi-lingual song.
response.global_summary: A 3D stage performance by VTuber Hakos Baelz, featuring her song 'SNAKE EYES'. The performance is interrupted by a brief talk segment at the 02:16 mark, followed by the resumption and completion of the performance.

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz performs the first part of 'SNAKE EYES' on stage with dancers.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
준비 (Junbi)
[Verse 1]
that’s good game, what a shame
players they all complain
why me? no, not again
shout ra-ta-ta, but
ain’t got time, so dry those eyes
look around, what’s that i spy
the broken and bruised
i’ll got something to prove now
[Pre-Chorus]
abracadabra, let’s go
watch them like dust as they fall (they fall)
끝까지 가보자 go
나는 내 맘대로 해 (hey)
double one, double win
lowly to lottery
do or die
[Chorus]
we hit that high (snake eyes, snake eyes)
come on, don’t be shy (snake eyes, snake eyes)
뜨겁게 따라 올라 (불타올라)
놀자 all day, all night (all day, all night)
[Post-Chorus]
so turn it up, can’t stop, won’t stop preachin
who said the sky’s a limit
show them that we mean business
we are the young and vicious
snake eyes, they never lie
fly high with pride
and leave your fears behind
지겨워
[Verse 2]
우리들의 광란의 party
보여줄게 환상 safari
baddie, baddie, nobody can stop me
끼리끼리 붙어, come on closer
go, go, 더 빨리 (check it out)
act in’ all naughty
싹 다 부셔 모조리
모조리 싹다 다다다
shake it off, what goes around
shut your mouth, will come back down
ready the fight
ready the screaming
[Pre-Chorus]
abracadabra, let’s go
watch it, we reap in’ it all (reap in’ it all)
꺾이지 않는 의지
될 대로 돼 볼래 play
reason, our demon
believe in the beaten
just wait and see
[Chorus]
we hit that high (snake eyes, snake eyes)
come on, don’t be shy (snake eyes, snake eyes)
뜨겁게 따라 올라 (불타올라)
놀자 all day, all night (all day, all night)
[Build]
let the beat drop
[Drop]
go, we go hard (go hard)
기사회생 전부를 걸어 bet
go, we go hard, we want it all
다시 일어나 파괴와 재생
[Bridge]
죽지 않아, 전부 걸어
맞서 싸워, 시작이야
take the crown
끝까지 달려가 rule (we’ll hit that high)
[Chorus]
we hit that eye (snake eyes, snake eyes)
come on, don’t be shy (eye; snake eyes, snake eyes)
같이 춤을 춰 봐, 이렇게
멈출 순 없어 같이 dance all night (준비)
[Post-Chorus]
don’t be afraid of losing
it’s just a new beginning
look at the cards we dealing
sometimes it takes a villain
snake eyes, the time is nigh
fly high with pride
and leave your fears behind

scenes.description: Performance is paused for a talk segment. Hakos Baelz talks to the audience.
Performance of 'SNAKE EYES' resumes and finishes.
